_meta.description: Grounded story seeds for Story Reel V2. Bank prioritizes emotionally legible, visually direct, high-save animal arcs: rescue, reunion, migration, homecoming, loyalty, and parent-young protection. Used as inspiration and scaffolding, not copied verbatim.

seeds.title: Swallow Finds the Old Nest
seeds.coreEvent: A young swallow loses the flock in bad weather and finds home by following memory, wind, and landmarks.
seeds.emotionalPattern: lost -> fear -> memory cue -> brave return -> belonging
seeds.stakes: If the swallow fails, night falls before home is found.
seeds.rationale: Natural homecoming arc with built-in stakes and visual clarity.

seeds.title: Elephant Calf Crosses the River
seeds.coreEvent: An elephant calf is stranded by rising water until the herd works together to bring it across.
seeds.emotionalPattern: separation -> panic -> failed attempt -> herd response -> safety
seeds.stakes: The calf is too small to cross alone before the current strengthens.
seeds.rationale: Large emotional contrast and clear rescue visuals.

seeds.title: Penguin Waits Through the Storm
seeds.coreEvent: A penguin parent waits through brutal wind to keep an egg safe until help arrives.
seeds.emotionalPattern: pressure -> endurance -> near collapse -> relief -> reunion
seeds.stakes: If the parent moves too soon, the egg freezes.
seeds.rationale: Parent-child bond with survival tension.

seeds.title: Dolphin Guides the Lost Calf
seeds.coreEvent: A young dolphin separated in rough water is guided back by an older dolphin using clicks and movement.
seeds.emotionalPattern: disorientation -> failed search -> guide appears -> trust -> reunion
seeds.stakes: The calf cannot surface safely alone in the chop.
seeds.rationale: Elegant rescue lane with strong sound/motion imagery.

seeds.title: Cat Finds Her Kittens Again
seeds.coreEvent: A mother cat must move her kittens one by one before heavy rain floods the alley.
seeds.emotionalPattern: threat -> urgency -> repeated effort -> last risky trip -> dry shelter
seeds.stakes: If she is too slow, the shelter floods before the final kitten is moved.
seeds.rationale: Parent rescue and home shift, very relatable for viewers.

seeds.title: Tiny Turtle Reaches the Sea
seeds.coreEvent: A hatchling crosses a beach full of danger, light, and confusion to reach the waves.
seeds.emotionalPattern: birth -> overwhelm -> wrong turn -> instinct -> breakthrough
seeds.stakes: Every wrong direction costs precious time before predators notice.
seeds.rationale: Classic high-stakes survival lane with immediate visuals.

seeds.title: Dog Waits by the Gate
seeds.coreEvent: A dog keeps returning to the gate each evening until the child he loves finally comes home.
seeds.emotionalPattern: routine -> hope -> disappointment -> persistence -> reunion
seeds.stakes: Emotionally grounded stakes, built on waiting and faith rather than danger.
seeds.rationale: Simple loyalty lane, very strong emotional payoff.

seeds.title: Gosling Crosses the Highway
seeds.coreEvent: A goose family must cross a dangerous road, and one smallest gosling falls behind.
seeds.emotionalPattern: movement -> danger -> separation -> courage -> family regrouped
seeds.stakes: The gosling is exposed and cannot keep pace with the flock.
seeds.rationale: Strong protection and motion-based tension.

seeds.title: Fox Cub Follows the Scent Home
seeds.coreEvent: A fox cub loses the den trail after chasing something bright and must trust scent and memory to return.
seeds.emotionalPattern: curiosity -> separation -> fear -> memory clue -> home found
seeds.stakes: Night settles before the cub can find the den again.
seeds.rationale: Clear homecoming lane with sensory detail potential.

seeds.title: Otter Keeps the Pup Close
seeds.coreEvent: A sea otter parent keeps a drifting pup safe through waves and sleep by never letting go.
seeds.emotionalPattern: drift -> risk -> care ritual -> exhaustion -> calm safety
seeds.stakes: If the pup drifts too far, the cold current takes it away.
seeds.rationale: Tender parent-young bond with clear memorable imagery.

seeds.title: Swan Carries Her Cygnets Through the Reeds
seeds.coreEvent: A swan mother ferries her tiny cygnets on her back through dark reeds while danger moves beneath the water.
seeds.emotionalPattern: fragile calm -> hidden threat -> protective closeness -> safe crossing -> relief
seeds.stakes: If the cygnets slip into open water too soon, they are exposed before they can keep up.
seeds.rationale: Strong parent protection image, instantly legible on mobile and highly saveable.

seeds.title: Herd Lifts the Calf From the Mud
seeds.coreEvent: An elephant calf sinks into river mud and the herd refuses to leave, circling back again and again until the calf is free.
seeds.emotionalPattern: play -> trap -> panic -> group effort -> exhausted relief
seeds.stakes: The deeper the calf struggles, the harder it becomes to pull free before night or rising water.
seeds.rationale: Classic herd empathy arc with huge emotional contrast and obvious progression.

seeds.title: Goose Refuses to Leave Her Injured Mate
seeds.coreEvent: When one goose is hurt during migration, the other circles back, stays on the ground, and keeps watch until the flock is gone and help arrives.
seeds.emotionalPattern: journey -> injury -> choice -> vigil -> reunion hope
seeds.stakes: If the mate leaves, the injured goose is alone and exposed, if the mate stays, both risk missing the flock.
seeds.rationale: Loyal return and stay-behind stories travel well because the sacrifice is instantly understood.

seeds.title: Pigeon Finds the Window Light Again
seeds.coreEvent: A young homing pigeon is blown far off course and spends the fading day searching for the one rooftop light she remembers.
seeds.emotionalPattern: confidence -> storm drift -> exhaustion -> memory cue -> return
seeds.stakes: If she misses the last light of day, every roof begins to look the same.
seeds.rationale: Homecoming plus a single guiding light gives a very strong loopable final image.

seeds.title: Penguin Father Keeps the Chick Warm
seeds.coreEvent: A penguin father holds a newly hatched chick above the ice through the worst cold, waiting for the mother to return across the white horizon.
seeds.emotionalPattern: birth -> exposure -> endurance -> near failure -> handoff and hope
seeds.stakes: If the chick touches the ice for even a moment too long, the cold wins.
visualHooks: white horizon with one returning shape
seeds.rationale: One of the clearest parent-sacrifice archetypes in nature.

seeds.title: Sea Lion Mother Finds Her Pup by Voice
seeds.coreEvent: In a deafening colony, a sea lion mother and pup call for each other until one familiar voice finally cuts through the noise.
seeds.emotionalPattern: crowd -> confusion -> frantic calling -> recognition -> reunion
seeds.stakes: If they fail to find each other before the tide turns, the pup is pushed deeper into the colony and away from safety.
visualHooks: one small pup lifting its head
foam line at the edge of rocks
seeds.rationale: Recognition-through-noise is emotionally strong and easy to narrate.

seeds.title: Puffin Brings One Last Fish Through the Storm
seeds.coreEvent: A puffin parent fights brutal wind for one final trip back to the burrow before the hungry chick gives up calling.
seeds.emotionalPattern: need -> effort -> setback -> one last push -> feeding relief
seeds.stakes: If the parent turns back empty, the chick waits another freezing night without food.
seeds.rationale: Simple need-based stakes and a very strong visual object, the last fish.

seeds.title: Koala Mother Carries Joey to the Cool Shade
seeds.coreEvent: In brutal heat, a koala mother climbs farther than usual to find one cool fork in the tree where her joey can rest and breathe.
seeds.emotionalPattern: heat -> strain -> searching -> shade found -> calm recovery
seeds.stakes: If they stay in the exposed branches, the joey weakens in the heat.
seeds.rationale: Heat-protection stories feel current and the visual is emotionally soft but urgent.

seeds.title: Pony Stays Beside the Smallest Foal
seeds.coreEvent: When a weak foal cannot keep up in a cold rain, an older pony slows down and stays beside it until the barn lights appear.
seeds.emotionalPattern: movement -> weakness -> refusal to abandon -> shared effort -> warm shelter
seeds.stakes: If the foal is left behind, the weather and distance become too much.
visualHooks: small foal leaning against older pony
seeds.rationale: Side-by-side endurance stories are emotionally obvious and easy to stage visually.

seeds.title: Rabbit Finds the Burrow After the Fireworks
seeds.coreEvent: A young rabbit bolts too far during a night of frightening noise and must find the burrow again by scent, shadow, and one familiar patch of clover.
seeds.emotionalPattern: panic -> distance -> hiding -> scent clue -> home found
seeds.stakes: If dawn comes before the rabbit finds the burrow, open ground becomes dangerous.
seeds.rationale: A frightened small-animal homecoming arc with strong garden visuals and parent empathy.

seeds.title: Doe Comes Back at Dusk
seeds.coreEvent: A hidden fawn waits alone in tall grass through the longest day until the doe returns exactly when the light begins to soften.
seeds.emotionalPattern: waiting -> doubt -> stillness -> return -> nursing calm
seeds.stakes: If the fawn leaves hiding too early, stillness no longer protects it.
seeds.rationale: Quiet waiting arcs are emotionally powerful when the final return image lands.

seeds.title: Arctic Fox Brings the Last Mouthful Home
seeds.coreEvent: An arctic fox parent crosses open snow with one last mouthful of food while the wind erases every track back to the den.
seeds.emotionalPattern: scarcity -> distance -> near loss -> stubborn return -> den reached
seeds.stakes: If the fox loses the trail, the hungry pups wait through another freezing night.
visualHooks: dark den hole in a drift
seeds.rationale: Resource scarcity plus return-home tension is a strong survival lane for narration.

seeds.title: Beluga Calf Hears the Returning Song
seeds.coreEvent: A beluga calf separated in shifting ice keeps answering the wrong calls until one low, familiar song leads it back through the blue dark.
seeds.emotionalPattern: separation -> false hope -> fear -> recognition -> reunion
seeds.stakes: If the calf follows the wrong calls too far, the ice closes the path back to its family.
visualHooks: small white calf turning toward sound
seeds.rationale: Voice-led reunion is easy to narrate and gives a very strong final reveal image.

seeds.title: Gorilla Mother Waits for the Smallest Climber
seeds.coreEvent: As the troop moves uphill before rain, a gorilla mother keeps stopping so her smallest baby can climb the slick roots without losing her.
seeds.emotionalPattern: movement -> struggle -> patience -> near slip -> safe arrival
seeds.stakes: If the baby loses the climb, the troop keeps moving and the storm reaches them first.
seeds.rationale: Waiting and looking back is a deeply readable parent image for mobile video.

seeds.title: Crane Flies One Wingbeat Behind
seeds.coreEvent: During a long migration, one young crane cannot hold formation in the crosswind and must keep one wingbeat behind the flock without disappearing into the storm.
seeds.emotionalPattern: journey -> weakness -> drift -> stubborn endurance -> dawn catch-up
seeds.stakes: If the young crane falls too far back, the flock is gone into cloud and distance.
seeds.rationale: Migration lag stories carry built-in motion, loneliness, and payoff.

seeds.title: Old Cat Sleeps by the Nursery Door
seeds.coreEvent: An old house cat begins sleeping outside the nursery every night after hearing one baby cry she cannot forget.
seeds.emotionalPattern: quiet routine -> alertness -> watchfulness -> reassurance -> belonging
seeds.stakes: The danger is emotional rather than physical, a tiny life that feels too new and breakable to leave alone.
seeds.rationale: This is soft but extremely relatable, a save/share lane for parents with pets.

seeds.title: Beaver Kit Keeps the Dam Closed
seeds.coreEvent: When spring water starts slipping through a weak spot in the dam, the smallest beaver kit keeps dragging branch after branch until the cold leak finally stops.
seeds.emotionalPattern: crack -> alarm -> repeated effort -> exhaustion -> water held back
seeds.stakes: If the gap widens before the family returns, the lodge floods.
seeds.rationale: Tiny character solving a real structural problem gives clean progression and payoff.

seeds.title: Lamb Follows the Bell Through the Fog
seeds.coreEvent: A lamb separated in morning fog stops chasing shapes and follows one soft bell sound back to the flock.
seeds.emotionalPattern: confusion -> wrong turns -> stillness -> familiar sound -> return
seeds.stakes: If the fog lifts before the lamb finds the flock, the field becomes too wide and exposed.
visualHooks: dim shape with bell at dawn
seeds.rationale: Sound-led homecoming is extremely legible and tender.

seeds.title: Orangutan Mother Builds One More Nest
seeds.coreEvent: At the end of a long day, an orangutan mother keeps weaving leaves into the sleeping nest because her baby is still too restless to settle.
seeds.emotionalPattern: fatigue -> care ritual -> restlessness -> extra effort -> safe sleep
seeds.stakes: If the nest stays too loose, the baby cannot sleep safely above the dark forest floor.
seeds.rationale: Night routine and extra parental effort make this emotionally sticky for parents.

seeds.title: Wolf Pup Hears the Pack Answer Back
seeds.coreEvent: A wolf pup answers the empty forest again and again until one returning howl finally reaches him from beyond the ridge.
seeds.emotionalPattern: calling -> silence -> persistence -> answer -> sprinting reunion
seeds.stakes: If night fully falls before the answer comes, the pup is alone outside the den range.
visualHooks: small pup howling in blue dusk
seeds.rationale: Call-and-answer structure is excellent for short-form narration and payoff.
